name: Halogen Enumerate + DFT (current paper)

steps.name: halogen_site_enumerate
steps.description: Enumerate all S/Cl/Br arrangements on 4a/4c sites

steps.name: mlip_screening
steps.description: MLIP single-point or relax for all halogen configs, rank by energy

steps.name: dft_relax
steps.description: DFT relaxation at each volume point. Cell fixed, atoms free. Basin consistency check.
steps.key_issue: Basin transitions possible at large volume expansion (v108)

steps.name: dft_eos
steps.description: 3rd-order Birch-Murnaghan EOS fitting -> B0, B0', V0
steps.volume_range: v096-v106 (v108 often excluded due to basin transition)

steps.name: v0_confirmation
steps.description: DFT relax at V0 grid point + tight SCF (conv_thr=1e-10)

limitations: Li from Rietveld, not re-optimized for Br substitution
comp5 basin problem: DB0=1.3 GPa, DC44=12.7 GPa
v108 basin transition excludes data points
